description: Unified ticketing MCP server for Jira, Linear, Trello, Notion, and GitHub Issues.
name: io.github.havilandsoftware/mcp-server-innoday

environmentVariables.description: URL of your running InnoDay API instance. Defaults to http://localhost:8002 — only required if running on a different port or remote host.
environmentVariables.name: INNODAY_API_URL

environmentVariables.description: Default organization ID (optional — can be passed per-tool call instead).
environmentVariables.name: INNODAY_ORGANIZATION_ID

title: InnoDay
